positive: An ultra-detailed, graphic, and whimsical illustration of a fantastical forest scene. The main subject is a graceful, glowing moth resting on a stylized branch, surrounded by oversized, bioluminescent flora and delicate magical particles. Style: Neo-Victorian naturalism meets modern graphic poster art. Composition: Symmetrical and centered, emphasizing the moth and its immediate floral ecosystem. Lighting: Deep twilight atmosphere with dramatic, glowing neon-accents emanating from the plants and moth wings, creating high contrast against deep midnight blues and forest greens. Color Direction: Limited palette of emerald green, royal purple, sapphire blue, and glowing gold. Print Details: Solid, clean lines suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment transfer. The overall mood is mysterious and enchanting. Vector-illustration quality, high contrast silhouette, clean edges.
